# Hughey LLC — Law Firm Marketing Intelligence
> Independent marketing consultant for law firms. Joe Hughey has 20+ years in legal marketing. Based in St. Petersburg, FL. Serving law firms nationally.

Hughey LLC helps law firms build marketing systems that track spend to retained clients — not just clicks or leads. We operate above the agency layer: auditing your data, managing vendor accountability, and optimizing your intake process.

## Core Services

- [Marketing Data Analysis for Law Firms](https://hugheyllc.com/services/data-analysis-for-law-firms): Building dashboards that show cost per retained client for every channel — Google Ads, SEO, referrals, directories.
- [Agency Management for Law Firms](https://hugheyllc.com/services/agency-management-for-law-firms): Holding marketing agencies accountable to outcomes, not activity metrics. Auditing deliverables, renegotiating contracts, replacing underperforming vendors.
- [Intake Process Optimization](https://hugheyllc.com/services/intake-process-optimization): Closing the gap between first contact and signed retainer. Most firms lose 30–40% of qualified leads in this window.
- [Strategic Marketing for Law Firms](https://hugheyllc.com/services/strategic-marketing-for-law-firms): Long-range marketing strategy aligned to practice area growth, competitive positioning, and firm economics.
- [Always Publishing. Always Ranking.](https://hugheyllc.com/services/always-publishing-always-ranking): Content and SEO systems that compound over time — local, practice area, and topical authority.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://hugheyllc.com): Overview of Hughey LLC's positioning and services.
- [About Joe Hughey](https://hugheyllc.com/about): Background, philosophy, and approach.
- [Contact / Free Strategy Call](https://hugheyllc.com/contact): Schedule a free 30-minute discovery call.
- [Blog](https://hugheyllc.com/blog): 80+ articles on law firm marketing strategy, SEO, intake, analytics, and agency management.
- [Resources](https://hugheyllc.com/resources): Free downloadable guides and checklists for law firm marketers.

## About Joe Hughey

Joe Hughey is an independent law firm marketing consultant with 20+ years of experience working exclusively in the legal industry. He is not an agency — he is the strategic layer above your vendors. Clients hire him when they are spending $5K–$50K/month on marketing and cannot clearly explain which channels are generating retained clients.

Contact: joe@joehughey.com | 727-483-3222 | hugheyllc.com
